Maintainer fixture

Real-browser reliability

Every successful interaction writes a stable key to the observable state and appends a bounded log entry.

JavaScript dialogs

These buttons intentionally block the tab. No dialog opens automatically.

Navigation and URL events

Redirect route

Network resources

The document, stylesheet, module script, and image load with the page. Reproduce adds fetch, XHR, script, image, WebSocket, cache, slow, HTTP failure, and aborted resources.

Network set idle
